# Let's read the provided text file
path = '/mnt/data/file-DmRfbADHgsbGg4NVxwQUta-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text

# Let's find all quoted substrings delimited by double quote "
import re

matches = [(m.start(1), m.end(1), m.group(1)) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text)]
matches

first_start, first_end, first_text = matches[0]
first_text, len(first_text), first_start, first_end

first_part = first_text[:split_index]
second_part = first_text[split_index+3:]
(first_part, len(first_part)), (second_part, len(second_part))

first_part_start = first_start
first_part_end = first_start + len(first_part)
second_part_start = first_part_end + 3  # for ' * '
second_part_end = first_end
(first_part_start, first_part_end, second_part_start, second_part_end)

# Build the citations list based on the extracted spans and our planned corrections.
citations = []

# Extract spans again to ensure exact strings
first_part_span = (109, 207)
second_part_span = (210, 275)
second_quote_span = (531, 596)
hadith_span = (855, 882)

first_part_text = text[first_part_span[0]:first_part_span[1]]
second_part_text = text[second_part_span[0]:second_part_span[1]]
second_quote_text = text[second_quote_span[0]:second_quote_span[1]]
hadith_text = text[hadith_span[0]:hadith_span[1]]

first_corrected = "إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَاهُ سَمِيعًا بَصِيرًا"
second_corrected = "إِنَّا هَدَيْنَاهُ السَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا"
third_corrected = "وَمِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ"

citations.append({
    "span_start": first_part_span[0],
    "span_end": first_part_span[1],
    "span_text": first_part_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الإنسان", "sura_number": 76, "aya_number": 2},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": first_corrected,
    "completely_invalid": False
})

citations.append({
    "span_start": second_part_span[0],
    "span_end": second_part_span[1],
    "span_text": second_part_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الإنسان", "sura_number": 76, "aya_number": 3},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": second_corrected,
    "completely_invalid": False
})

citations.append({
    "span_start": second_quote_span[0],
    "span_end": second_quote_span[1],
    "span_text": second_quote_text,
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الذاريات", "sura_number": 51, "aya_number": 49},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": third_corrected,
    "completely_invalid": False
})

citations.append({
    "span_start": hadith_span[0],
    "span_end": hadith_span[1],
    "span_text": hadith_text,
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},  # Unknown
    "corrected_text": "خطأ",
    "completely_invalid": True
})

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":109,"span_end":207,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِنْ نُطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَاهُ سَمِيعًا بَصِيرًا","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الإنسان","sura_number":76,"aya_number":2},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَاهُ سَمِيعًا بَصِيرًا","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":210,"span_end":275,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ هَدَيْنَاهُ السَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الإنسان","sura_number":76,"aya_number":3},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"إِنَّا هَدَيْنَاهُ السَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":531,"span_end":596,"span_text":"وَمِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الذاريات","sura_number":51,"aya_number":49},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"وَمِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":855,"span_end":882,"span_text":"لعن الله من عمل عمل قوم لوط","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
